chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.358 of 2023 Rehman Badshah Versus M/s Holy Quran Society of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on CMA 4304/23 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA 4305/23 Dated: 19.01.2024 Ms. Farzana Yasmin for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel has moved an application under Order XXIII Rule 1 CPC in Court today and submits that the purpose of filing this lis has been achieved and as such she has been instructed to withdraw this appeal. The application is accordingly allowed and instant High Court Appeal is withdrawn along with listed applications. The application filed today in Court is taken on record and office is directed to assign CMA number to it. Judge Judge
